allow: Bash(npm ls react-leaflet leaflet react react-dom)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "if \(Test-Path ''C:\\DayZServer''\) { Write-Host ''=== RPT in root ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\*.rpt'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== Subdirectories ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host ''=== RPT in profiles ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\profiles\\*.rpt'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== RPT in profile ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\profile\\*.rpt'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime } else { Write-Host ''DayZServer directory not found'' }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host ''=== RPT in logs ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\logs\\*.rpt'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== RPT anywhere \(recursive\) ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\*.rpt'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== ADM/LOG files in logs ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\logs\\*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host ''=== server_manager dir ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\server_manager\\*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== sakhal dir \(first 10\) ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\sakhal'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10 Name; Write-Host ''=== config dir ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\config\\*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host ''=== Looking for serverDZ.cfg ===''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\DayZServer\\serverDZ.cfg'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName,Length; Write-Host ''=== Check -profiles in any cfg ===''; if \(Test-Path ''C:\\DayZServer\\serverDZ.cfg''\) { Select-String -Path ''C:\\DayZServer\\serverDZ.cfg'' -Pattern ''profile'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ''=== Any RPT in AppData local? ===''; Get-ChildItem ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DayZ\\*.rpt"" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime; Write-Host ''=== Any RPT in AppData local DayZ \(recursive\) ===''; Get-ChildItem ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DayZ"" -Recurse -Filter ''*.rpt'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime")
